speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: farz nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai
text: Ek widow hone ke naate samaj ki nazrein mujh par hamesha rehti hain, aur aaj PTM mein dusre parents mere accent ka mazak uda rahe the toh dil baith gaya. Par main rone ke liye ruk nahi sakti kyunki bacchon ki school ki taiyari aur saas ki dawai ka waqt ho gaya tha. Parivaar ki izzat bani rahe isliye main bas apna kaam kiye ja rahi hoon. Thakan itni hai ki sharir toot raha hai, par farz nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty frame to validate her heavy responsibilities before exploring the pain.
text: Tum par bacchon aur saas ki itni sari zimmeyariyan hain, aur samajh sakti hoon ki vidhwa hone ki wajah se tumhe parivaar ki izzat ka bojh bhi akele uthana pad raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: farz nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai
text: Haan, akele sab sambhalna padta hai. Accent theek nahi hai mera kyunki gaon se aayi thi inke yahan. Inke jaane ke baad sab badal gaya. Saas hamesha tana marti hain ki main bacchon ko kya sikhaungi. Main bas yahi sochti hoon ki apna dard kisi ko dikha nahi sakti, farz nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duration and constancy of her struggle since her husband passed.
text: Itne dino se, jabse wo gaye hain, tum lagatar sabka dhyan rakh rahi ho bina thake, bina apni chinta kiye, kyunki tumhe lagta hai rukne ka waqt hi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Waqt kahan hai mere paas? Subah se raat tak kitchen aur saas ki sewa. Kabhi lagta hai ki meri apni koi pehchan hi nahi bachi. Aaj school mein jab un auraton ne hasa, mujhe andar se itni sharam aayi. Par kya karoon, bacchon ke samne rona bhi theek nahi lagta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently exploring the feeling of shame and loss of identity when facing outside mockery.
text: Tumne kaha ki aaj tum apni pehchan ko lekar thoda akela mehsoos kar rahi ho, itni mehnat ke baad bhi jab bahar wale mazak udate hain toh andar se kaisa lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar se aisa lagta hai jaise main kisi layak nahi hoon. Ek toh akele bacche paal rahi hoon, aur upar se log aise dekhte hain jaise main gawar hoon. Saas ko bhi lagta hai ki main ghar ki izzat mitti mein mila dungi. Sharir toot raha hota hai thakan se, phir bhi sabka dhyaan rakhna padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of tarnishing the family's honor to build trust.
text: Tumhe shayad andar hi andar yeh darr lagta hai ki agar tumne galti se bhi koi kami chhod di, toh sab tumhe hi galat thehrayenge aur parivaar ki izzat par sawal uthayenge...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: farz nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai
text: Bilkul yahi hota hai hamesha. Agar dawai mein thodi bhi deri ho jaye, toh pura ghar sar par utha leti hain. Kehti hain ki mera dhyan bas doosri cheezon mein hai. Isliye main kisi se umeed nahi rakhti, bas farz nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing how she carries this immense solitary burden in her quiet moments.
text: Jab din bhar itni baatein sunne ke baad aur thakan se tootne ke baad raat ko tum akele hoti ho, tab yeh saara bojh tum kaise bardaasht karti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas chupchap sehte rehna padta hai. Lagta hai jaise koi samajhne wala hi nahi bacha. Samaj ki nazrein vidhwa par kaisi hoti hain aap jante hi hain, log toh bas mauka dhoondhte hain taane marne ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational withdrawal and how societal judgment isolates her.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki apno aur samaj ke taano ki wajah se tum khud ko sabse kaat kar ek alag duniya mein band kar rahi ho, jahan koi tumhe takleef na de sake...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aisa hi lagta hai. Kabhi kabhi saans lene mein bhi takleef hoti hai is ghutan ki wajah se. Sab sochte hain ki main bahut strong hoon, par andar se khokhli ho chuki hoon. Bacchon ki fees, saas ke taane... aur upar se bahar walon ka mazak. Main kisko bolun ki main thak gayi hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the unexpressed exhaustion and isolation stemming from duty and societal pressures, after normalizing the mild risk of breathlessness.
text: Yeh ghutan itni bhari hai ki saans phoolna bohot laazmi hai. Tumhari baaton se lagta hai ki tum ek akelepan aur thakan ke beech phansi ho, ek darr hai kisi ko niraash na karne ka, aur yeh dard bahut bhaari lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne sach kaha... log toh bas ungli uthana jante hain. Mere maike wale bhi ab zyada dhyaan nahi dete, kehte hain ab tera ghar wahi hai. Kabhi lagta hai ki aakhir mera apna koi ghar hai bhi ya nahi? Bas doosron ki seva karte karte zindagi nikal jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her worth entirely apart from societal expectations and confirming her exhaustion is culturally normal.
text: Ek aurat aur ek maa hone ke naate, tum apna farz poori imaandari se nibha rahi ho aur yeh bahut himmat ki baat hai. Aise samaj mein jahan vidhwa aurat par jaldi ungli uthayi jati hai, tumhara thak jana aur akele rona bilkul jayaz hai. Tumhari mehnat tumhari shiddat dikhati hai, unke tano se tumhari keemat kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Ghar ki baat bahar nikalne se badnami hoti hai, samaj wale jeene nahi dete. Main apni doston se bhi nahi milti ab. Darr lagta hai ki unke saamne ro na padun aur wo meri halat dekh kar taras khayein. Mujhe taras nahi chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handling the stigma cue by softly mirroring her self-protective withdrawal from friends.
text: Tum apni doston aur aaspas ke logon se thoda doori bana kar rakh rahi ho kyunki tum nahi chahti ki koi tumhari majboori dekhe ya tum par daya kare...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, daya wali nazrein chubh jati hain. Mera accent un doston jaisa polished nahi hai na ab. Pehle unke sath jati thi toh koi mazak nahi udata tha, ab main akeli hoon toh sabko lagta hai main asahay hoon. Aise mahaul mein mera dum ghutta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the specific silence and isolation placed on homemakers and widows.
text: Humare yahan akele parivaar sambhalne wali auraton mein yeh akelepan aur ghutan se guzarna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki humein sikhaya jata hai ki ghar ki baat bahar mat nikalo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut parayi lagti hai duniya. Par main kya karoon? Mujhe akele hi aage badhna hai apne bacchon ke liye. Unko acchi shiksha deni hai taaki wo is samaj mein seena taan ke chal sakein. Lekin ab samajh nahi aa raha ki khud ko kaise sambhalun. Batao kya karoon main ab?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable options that fit into her rigid duties and honor her role without adding burden.
text: Tumhara bacchon ke liye sochna bahut badi baat hai. Jab bhi achanak thakan ya ghutan ho, toh kya tum din mein sirf 5 minute bathroom mein ya akele baith kar lambi saans le sakti ho? Ya phir apni kisi ek bharosemand purani saheli ko sirf messages ke zariye haal chal puchne ki shuruwat kar sakti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dost ko message karna toh theek hai, par waqt kam milta hai. Bathroom mein thoda waqt nikal leti hoon jab saas so jati hain dopahar mein. Wahi ek jagah hai jahan main apne aansu poch sakti hoon shanti se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding her through one realistic suggestion step-by-step for the immediate future.
text: Pehle kal dopahar ko jab saas so jayen, toh bas wahan 5 minute shanti se baithna... aur apni saanson par dhyan dena bina kisi kaam ke bare mein soche... bas itna hi aane wale kal ke liye try karo.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: farz nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai
text: Haan, main yeh karungi. Thoda thehrav shayad zaroori hai. Kyunki agar main hi gir gayi, toh bacchon ka kya hoga? Farz nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai, chahe thoda waqt akele rona hi kyun na pade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the crushing weight of duty as a systemic structural pressure on widows, not a personal flaw.
text: Humare samaj mein auraton ko, khaas kar jo akele ghar chala rahi hain, yeh mehsoos karwaya jata hai ki unhe khud par dhyan nahi dena chahiye aur sirf ghar ka sochna chahiye. Yeh dabaav purana hai aur tumhari koi galti nahi hai isme.

speaker: Seeker
text: Galti toh nahi hai, par saza mujhe hi mil rahi hai roz. Saas ke taane bhi isliye hote hain kyunki unhe lagta hai unka beta mere naseeb ki wajah se chala gaya. Main bas sehti rehti hoon kyunki izzat ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her compliance out of duty and fear of losing respect.
text: Tum saas ki har baat ko chupchap isliye seh rahi ho kyunki tumhe lagta hai ki bahu ka dharam nibhane ke liye apni takleef ko dabana zaruri hai, taaki parivaar ki izzat bachi rahe...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Agar main bol padi, toh woh society mein jaa kar bolengi ki bahu ulta jawab deti hai. Mujhe apne bacchon par in baton ka asar nahi daalna hai. Isliye main chup rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring how hiding her pain affects her relationship with her children as she moves forward.
text: Jab tum bacchon ke samne apna dukh chhupati ho aur is bojh ko akele uthati ho, toh tum unke sath apne is rishte ko aage kaise dekhti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Unke sath thoda sukoon milta hai. Jab wo mummy-mummy kehte hain, toh lagta hai mere jeene ka ek maqsad hai. Lekin andar hi andar darr bhi lagta hai ki kya mera accent, mera background unhe sharminda toh nahi karega bade hokar?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the feared consequence of her children someday mirroring society's judgment of her.
text: Tumhe kahin na kahin yeh darr satata hai ki tumhari in jani anjani baton ki wajah se aage chal kar tumhare bacche bhi sharminda na mehsoos karne lagein...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yahi darr khaye jata hai. Par aapki baatein sunkar thodi tasalli mili hai. Main koshish karungi ki bahar walon ki baaton ko itna dil par na loon. Aakhir meri duniya toh mere bacche hi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering a concrete, culturally suitable way to handle future mockery and connect with someone similar.
text: Haan, aage jab bhi aisi nakaratmak baatein aayein, toh kya tum us waqt apne dil mein yeh dohra sakti ho ki 'main ek acchi maa hoon'? Ya phir school mein kisi ek aisi maa se baat karne ki koshish kar sakti ho jo tumhari hi tarah zameen se judi ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ek dusri lady aati hai, uske kapde thode simple hote hain. Maine kabhi baat nahi ki kyunki main darti thi. Par shayad agli baar main usse thodi si muskurahat dekar baat shuru karne ki koshish kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her tentative step towards connection and the relational safety she perceives.
text: Tum us lady se judne ke baare mein soch rahi ho, kyunki usme tumhe apni tarah sadgi dikhti hai jahan shayad mazak udne ka darr na ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek waisa hi lagta hai. Shayad isse mera akelepan thoda kam ho. Mujhe ab pehle se halka lag raha hai. Aapne meri baat itne dhyan se suni aur mujhe samjha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing societal judgment regarding accents as superficial compared to her profound strength and resilience.
text: Tumhe tasalli milte dekh mujhe accha lag raha hai. Bahar ke samaj ki yeh ek kadvahat hai ki wo aksar logo ko unke accent ya bheshe se judge karte hain, par aakhir mein jo asli taqat hai, wo tumhari imaandari aur mehnat hai jo sabse upar hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: farz nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai
text: Haan, ab mujhe samajh aa raha hai. Main akeli zaroor dikhti hoon, par kamzor nahi hoon. Main dhyan rakhungi apna aur us 5 minute wale aaraam ko bathroom mein zaroor try karungi kal. Farz nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai, par thode thehrav ke sath.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her newfound balance between duty and taking a small moment for herself.
text: Tum is sach ko ab apna rahi ho ki tumhari zimmeyariyon ke beech mein, thoda sa thehrav rakhna bhi tumhara haq hai taaki tum aur mazbooti se sabka dhyan rakh sako...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera kirdaar hi mere bacchon ki dhaal hai isliye rukkna meri kismat mein nahi
text: Mera accent unke liye joke hai, par mere liye ye meri purani identity ka bacha hua hissa hai jo main joint family ki 'bahu' banne ke chakkar mein kho chuki hoon. Divorcee hone ka stigma pehle hi dimaag pe bojh hai, par main break nahi le sakti kyunki bacchon ke future ke liye mujhe hi structural endurance dikhani hai. Mera kirdaar hi mere bacchon ki dhaal hai isliye rukkna meri kismat mein nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the core duty frame, highlighting the Seeker's focus on her children's future before uncovering underlying pain.
text: Tumhare bacchon ki dhaal banna, unke aane wale kal ke liye bina ruke aage badhna... yeh ek maa ka kitna bada farz nibha rahi ho tum.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, farz toh hai. Par kabhi kabhi lagta hai is 'bahu' aur 'maa' ke farz mein main khud ko pura kho chuki hoon. Apna accent chupana padta hai, har din ek judgemental nazar se bachna padta hai. Bahut exhaustion feel hoti hai andar se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the implied fear of the consequences for the children if the Seeker fails to maintain her structural endurance.
text: Is exhaustion ke beech, ek darr sa laga rehta hai ki agar tumne apna yeh farz pura nahi kiya, toh bachhon ko bhi usi stigma ka samna karna padega jisse tum guzri ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera kirdaar hi mere bacchon ki dhaal hai
text: Exactly. Divorce ka tag itna bhari hai yahan. Logon ki nazron mein meri galti hi hogi. Aur mere bacchon ko woh taane na sunne pade, isliye main perfectly sab manage karne ki koshish karti hoon. Mera kirdaar hi mere bacchon ki dhaal hai, toh main thakne ki luxury afford nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the relational dynamic of standing between the children and the judgemental joint family while applying soft pause for stigma cue.
text: Tum un sab taanon ke beech ek mazboot deewar banke khadi ho gayi ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, deewar hi hoon. Par is deewar mein ab daraarein aa rahi hain. Main apne baccho ke liye duty toh kar rahi hoon, lekin apni identity bhool chuki hoon. Kabhi lagta hai main kaun hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated the feeling of isolation stemming from the continuous masking of her true identity to maintain family honor.
text: Lagta hai is roz-roz ki izzat bachane ki koshish aur apni pehchaan ko chupane ke bojh mein tum bahut akele pad gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akeli hi toh hoon. Is joint family mein kisi se dil ki baat nahi kar sakti. Sab ko bas ek adarsh bahu chahiye jo chupchap ghar chalaye. Meri apni koi jagah nahi hai yahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalized the exhaustion and isolation as a structural issue facing single mothers, affirming her humanity beyond her role.
text: Tumhari jagah koi bhi hota toh woh is dabaav aur thakan se toot jata. Hamari society mein ek single mother se itna expect kiya jata hai ki log bhool jate hain ki woh bhi ek jeeti-jaagti insaan hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera kirdaar hi mere bacchon ki dhaal hai isliye rukkna meri kismat mein nahi
text: Jeeti-jaagti kahan? Mera kirdaar hi mere bacchon ki dhaal hai isliye rukkna meri kismat mein nahi. Lekin dhaal bhi toh kabhi patthar lagne se ghis jaati hai na?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used a brief self-disclosure to normalize the loss of identity within a joint family, showing the pattern is societal, not personal.
text: Maine aisi kai maayon se baat ki hai jo is joint family setup mein apni pehchaan bhula deti hain—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj 'achhi aurat' ke role se hatne nahi deta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh baat hai. Divorce ke baad waise hi meri koi galti dhundhne ke liye sabki nazrein mujh par hoti hain. Isliye main kabhi shikayat nahi karti. Par ab bojh itna zyada ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the chronological weight and endurance of silently carrying the burden over a long period.
text: Itne waqt se bina kisi se shikayat kiye, har roz is kashmakash aur darr ke bojh ko chupchap uthana bohot thaka dene wala lamba safar lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur ab lagta hai mujhe kuch apne liye bhi dekhna hoga, warna aage bachhon ko kya sikhaugi. Ab kya karoon samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, bas ek relief chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframed the exhaustion as a consequence of societal pressure and the unfair structure, not personal failure.
text: Aisa mehsus hona bahut lazmi hai jab societal pressure aur divorce ka stigma ek insaan par poora zimma daal de. Yeh tumhari khud ki kamzori nahi hai, balki is joint family structure ka dawaab hai jo bahut unfair hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unfair toh hai, par us dabaav ko main jhelne ko majboor hoon. Main theek hona chahti hoon, thoda shanti chahiye dimaag mein. Koi raasta hai kya is thakan ko thoda kam karne ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered low-barrier, actionable suggestions that fit within her demanding daily routine without adding obligation.
text: Raaste toh mil jayenge. Ek option hai din mein 10 minute sirf apne purane doston se baat karna bina kisi farz ke. Ya phir raat ko jab sab so jayein, toh bas ek cup chai akele balcony mein peena apne aap ko yaad dilane ke liye ki tumhari bhi ahemiyat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Doston se baat kiye toh arsa ho gaya. Call karungi toh ro padungi shayad. Par woh chai wala idea try kar sakti hoon. Akele kuch waqt shanti se baithna better lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Broke down the chosen suggestion into a clear, immediate step-by-step action for the night.
text: Pehle yeh karo… jab aaj raat sab so jayein, toh apna phone door rakh ke ek cup chai banana… phir akele thodi der chup chap baithna, aur bas khud ko saans lene dena… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh thoda ajeeb lagega mujhe. Bachhon ka khayal rakhne ki itni aadat ho gayi hai ki akele baith kar bhi dimaag wahin daudega. Par meri thakan ko thoda rest toh dena padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the fear that self-care might equate to failing her primary duty towards her children.
text: Shayad tumhe lagta ho ki thodi der apne liye nikalne se tumhare farz mein koi kami aa jayegi aur kahin na kahin iska asar bachhon par padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek ajeeb sa guilt rehta hai dimaag mein. Agar maine apne aaram ke bare mein socha toh kahin main ek laaparwah maa toh nahi kehlaungi? Yeh blame main nahi le sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Named the guilt explicitly and validated how it compounds the exhaustion.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki guilt ka yeh darr tumhe thoda aur exhausted bana deta hai, kyunki farz aur apni saans lene ki jagah ke beech balance banana bohot bhari pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera kirdaar hi mere bacchon ki dhaal hai isliye rukkna meri kismat mein nahi
text: Sahi mein bhari hai. Mera kirdaar hi mere bacchon ki dhaal hai isliye rukkna meri kismat mein nahi... par yeh akele chai peene wala plan mujhe utna guilty nahi feel kara raha. Yeh main kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed the Seeker's decision to carve out small moments of relief, validating that protecting herself helps protect the children.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki us chote se step se tumhe thoda guilt-free mehsus ho raha hai. Tumhare bacche safe hain, aur apne aap ko recharged rakhne ke liye tumhara yeh karna bilkul valid hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas ek dikkat hai. Agar joint family mein kisi ne mujhe akele aaram se baithe dekh liya toh bolenge ki ghar ke kaam pade hain aur bahu akele waqt bita rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected how the fear of family judgement policing her behavior threatens even tiny moments of peace.
text: Unke aise taanon aur ungli uthane ki aadat ka darr tumhari us 10 minute ki shanti par bhi pehra laga deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isliye mujhe raat ke 11 baje tak wait karna padega. Tabhi sab baaki log so jaate hain. Us waqt shayad main bina kisi judgement ke waqt nikal saku.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframed the need for extensive planning for basic peace as a structural constraint of patriarchal joint families.
text: Aise mahaul mein apne liye ek choti si space dhundne ke liye bhi itni sari planning karni padti hai, yeh us expectations ke structure ka asar hai jisme aurat se bas 24 ghante seva ki ummeed hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Seva hi toh kar rahi hoon kabse. Pehle shadi bachane ke liye, ab yahan bacchon ki future bachane ke liye. Apna kuch bacha hi nahi hai life mein, bas duty hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the long-term endurance of suppressing her needs from the start of her marriage until now.
text: Shadi ke us safar se lekar aaj yahan tak, ek lamba samay beet gaya hai sirf doosron ki zaruratein poori karte hue aur apni pehchaan ko door rakhte hue.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan lamba samay ho gaya. Par aaj raat woh chai wali aadat shuru karungi. Mujhe chai aur thodi khamoshi chahiye. Aaj ka din exhaust kar dene wala tha waise bhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassured the Seeker of her right to rest, validating that even a small break supports her overall capacity to cope.
text: Tum is thode se sukoon aur waqt ke bilkul haqdaar ho. Ek maa ki duty har waqt nibhana bahut bada bojh hai, aur yeh break tumhe khud se judne ka thoda mauka dega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad isse meri purani identity ka thoda hissa main us balcony mein wapas mehsoos kar saku. Doston wali himmat aane mein waqt lagega, par shuruat zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the fear of vulnerability with friends, acknowledging how dropping the 'strong' mask could feel overwhelming.
text: Tumhe shayad darr hai ki doston ke saamne khulne par purani asliiyat itni bahaar aa jayegi ki phir se is nayi duty mein khud ko adjust karna bhari lagne lagega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ho sakta hai. Agar main unke aage ro di toh unhe bhi taras aayega, aur main bechari nahi dikhna chahti bilkul. Mujhe apni dhaal majboot hi rakhni hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated the difficulty of letting go of the resilient persona, reflecting the aversion to pity.
text: Aisa prateet hota hai ki tumhe us bechari banne wali nazron se bachaav karna bohot zaroori lagta hai, aur 'strong' dikhne ki aadat chhodna mushkil hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mushkil toh hai. Lekin aaj thoda mind light feel ho raha hai aapse baat karke. Main dhyaan rakhungi, bas kabhi kabhi sunne wala chahiye. Aaj raat wali chai main peena shuru karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed the courage taken today to step towards reclaiming a small piece of her identity, ending on a supportive note.
text: Yeh sun ke sach mein bahut tassali mili. Tum itne akele itna bojh utha rahi ho, par aaj tumne apni identity ki taraf ek bahot himmat wala kadam uthaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mere paas thakne ka luxury nahi hai
text: Unke tano ke baad dil kiya ki sab chhod doon, par career gap itna bada hai ki mujhe har choti insult peekar bhi kaam karna padega taaki bacchon ki schooling pressure na badhe. Samaj mein akeli aurat ko bohot kuch sehna padta hai, isliye main apni feelings ko side karke bas ghar ke kaamo aur bacchon ki parvarish mein lagi hoon. Mere paas thakne ka luxury nahi hai, bas endurance hi meri majboori ban gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame to validate her core identity as a mother while acknowledging the mild risk with warm normalising.
text: Yeh taane aur insult sehna wakayi bahut exhausting hota hoga. Tum bacchon ki schooling aur parvarish ko apne aaram se upar rakh rahi ho, jaise ki tumne kaha ki thakne ki luxury nahi hai tumhare paas.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mere paas thakne ka luxury nahi hai
text: Haan, aur karun bhi toh kya? Career gap itna lamba raha hai ki ab job mili bhi hai toh entry level ki. Wahan bhi aur ghar aakar bhi taane sunna padta hai. Mere paas thakne ka luxury nahi hai, bas chalte rehna hai bina ruke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the implied fear of stopping due to dual burdens.
text: Dono jagah apne aap ko prove karna padta hai har roz. Aisa lagta hai ki agar tum ruki, toh bacchon ka future aur unki zarooratein affect ho jayengi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul wahi darr lagta hai. Agar main weak pad gayi toh unki fees kaun bharega? Ghar par akele dono roles nibhana aasaan nahi hai. Aisa lagta hai saans lene ki bhi jagah nahi bachi hai meri life mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the constant feeling of suffocation and lack of personal space over time.
text: In dono roles ko bina kisi break ke lagatar nibhana... yeh continuously tumhe saans bhi nahi lene de raha hai aur ek bohot zyada thakawat mehsoos kara raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Kabhi kabhi raaton mein neend nahi aati yeh soch kar ki akele kab tak khichega yeh sab. Mujhe unhe kisi bhi keemat par disappoint nahi karna hai, par main andar se poori tarah khaali ho chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question arising from the Seeker's words after normalising the empty feeling.
text: Andar se poori tarah khaali mehsoos karna wakayi bahut bhaari padta hoga. Jab tum kehti ho ki tumhe kisi ko disappoint nahi karna hai, toh us waqt dimaag mein sabse zyada kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sirf bacchon ke baare mein sochti hoon. Unhone already life mein uthal-puthal dekhi hai. Main unhe ek normal life dena chahti hoon. Par is sabko theek rakhne ki keemat meri apni poori existence ban gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the exhaustion and fear of disappointing that comes from her duty-based coping mechanism.
text: Lagta hai tumhe is baat ka bahut gehra darr hai ki bacche phir se pareshan na ho jayein, aur is wajah se jo exhaustion ikattha ho raha hai usne tumhari khud ki pehchaan ko hi dhundhla kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mere paas thakne ka luxury nahi hai
text: Khud ko toh bahut pehle hi peeche chhod diya tha. Akeli aurat ke upar har cheez ka double pressure hota hai. Society dekhti hai ki yeh fail hogi. Main fail nahi ho sakti, par mere paas thakne ka luxury nahi hai... yeh boj ab mujhe sach mein tod raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue with a shorter restatement focusing on the duty and society pressure, ending with a soft pause.
text: Fail na hone ka pressure aur society ki in nazron ka boj sach mein tumhe andar se tod raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Agar main thoda sa bhi bolun ki main thak gayi hoon, log tano ki barish kar denge ki khud akele rehne ka decision liya tha, ab bhugto. Isliye kisi se yeh weakness share karna bekar hi lagta hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her feeling of isolation as culturally normal for single women in Indian society, separating her self-worth from societal judgement.
text: Akele apne balboote par ghar aur bahar manage karna ek bahut badi aur himmat wali baat hai. Samaj ke taano ke darr se chup rehna aur isolated feel karna aam baat hai humari society mein, par iska matlab yeh bilkul nahi ki tumhari thakan koi weakness hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Weakness nahi, par thak zaroor gayi hoon buri tarah. Office mein kaam, ghar pe khana banana, phir bacchon ki padhai dekhna. Aisa lagta hai ki bas ek machine hoon jise bina rukaawat sirf chalna hai society ko dikhane ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote from a similar role to normalize her experience without offering a solution.
text: Mujhe yaad hai meri ek jaan-pehchaan wali single mother ne bhi aisi hi baat share ki thi. Unhone bhi yahi kaha tha ki woh ek chalte-phirte robot jaisi ban gayi hain, kyunki dual burden bahut zyada hota hai aur samaj unki mehnat ko acknowledge nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly! Wahi robot wali feeling hai. Par main aise hamesha ke liye toh nahi jee sakti hoon na. Bacchon ko bhi ek frustrated maa nahi chahiye. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, koi raasta hai kya is exhaustion ko thoda kam karne ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 small options that fit her existing duties to help manage her immediate exhaustion.
text: Tumhari chinta bilkul wazib hai aur bacchon ke liye ek accha step hai. Is thakawat ko thoda kam karne ke liye, shayad hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Ek, jab tum office se aati ho, toh 5 minute ka ek chota break le sakti ho sirf shant baithne ke liye. Dusra, raat ke khane ki taiyari mein bacchon ko thoda sa khel ke roop mein involve karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Office se aakar 5 minute baithna shayad main kar sakti hoon actually. Abhi toh halat yeh hai ki aate hi chappal nikal kar seedha kitchen mein ghus jati hoon kaam niptane.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the 5-minute break suggestion step by step.
text: Pehle yeh karo... jab tum kal shaam ko darwaza kholo aur bag rakho, toh uske turant baad seedhe kitchen mein mat jao. Ek glass paani lo, 5 minute sofa par aaram se baitho, sirf us paani par aur apni saans par dhyaan do... aur phir apna baaki routine shuru karo. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh try karungi main bilkul. Par ek baat aur, in taano ka kya karoon? Jab office mein ya relatives indirectly mujhe sunate hain meri akelepan aur career gap ko lekar, toh bahut gussa aur bebasi feel hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe of the stigma she faces.
text: Woh taane actually tumhari koi kami nahi dikhate, balki samaj ki us narrow soch ka nateeja hain jahan ek akeli aurat ka apne dum par aage badhna logo ko uncomfortable kar deta hai. Tum society ki purani soch ko tod kar aage badh rahi ho, jo unke liye naya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh nazaariya sunkar thoda bojh kam lag raha hai. Ek single maa hona sach mein society mein sabse bada struggle hai. Par raat ko bacchon ka sota hua chehra dekh kar lagta hai ki yeh sab sehna worth it hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the deep connection between her endurance and the love for her children.
text: Bacchon se yeh pyara judav aur unki khushi tumhe lagatar himmat deti hai in sabhi mushkilon aur taano se akele ladne ki.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mere paas thakne ka luxury nahi hai
text: Haan, bas wahi ek umeed hai. Par kabhi kabhi I feel ki unke liye mazboot bane rehne mein meri apni khushi poori tarah kho si gayi hai. Mere paas thakne ka luxury nahi hai, toh main bas bacchon ki khushi ko hi apni zaroorat maan chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the fear of losing her own joy entirely under the weight of her responsibilities.
text: Aisa mehsus hota hai ki lagatar itna mazboot bane rehne mein aur unki har zarurat puri karne mein, kahin tumne khud ki identity ko poori tarah na kho diya ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Izzat aur achi parvarish ke chakkar mein khud ko ignore kar diya tha maine. Ab samajh aa raha hai ki mujhe internally theek rehna hoga bacchon ke liye. Unke liye apne ko poori tarah khatam kar dena bhi theek nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe her taking a pause as a valid and necessary part of her duty towards her children.
text: Ek dum sahi kaha. Bacchon ko acchi parvarish dene ki tumhari jo sabse badi responsibility hai, usme khud ko choti choti breaks de kar charge karna bhi usi duty ka ek zaroori hissa ban jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas practically implement karne mein thoda waqt lagega kyunki kaam itna hota hai. I will start with that 5 minutes break. Par andar kahin darr lagta hai ki achanak se kisi din mera poora breakdown ho gaya toh kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm that having fears of a breakdown is natural given her load, normalizing the mild risk.
text: Breakdown ka yeh darr dil mein hona bahut hi natural hai jab aap itni saari baatein akele utha rahi hon ek pressure-bhari society mein. Yeh darr normal hai, aur yahi wajah hai ki ab tum woh chote steps apne liye le rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main apna best try karungi kal se. Agar main dimag se thoda free rahungi toh shayad main office mein apne kaam pe bhi better focus kar paungi without taking those career gap taunts to heart.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how managing her energy helps her navigate the societal taunts at work.
text: Thodi mental clarity aur space milne se tumhara apne goals par focus badhega, jisse doosro ki negative baaton ka asar tumpar kam hone lagega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mere paas thakne ka luxury nahi hai
text: Umeed toh yahi kar rahi hoon. Mere paas thakne ka luxury nahi hai, yeh ek bitter sach hai meri life ka, par chote chote breaks toh main le hi sakti hoon apna mind clear karne ke liye, right? Ek glass paani wali exercise doable lag rahi hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a forward-looking question to ground her in the upcoming positive action.
text: Saans lene ka hak toh har insaan ka hai, tumhara bhi. Jab kal tum sach mein apna routine rokar woh 5 minute paani piyogi, toh us moment mein kaisa feel karne ki umeed rakhti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main shayad finally thoda calm feel karungi. Jaise din bhar ki running aur tano ke baad ek chota pause mil gaya ho mujhe. Yeh thehraav literally mere aur bacchon dono ke liye aage badhne ke liye zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the immense value and benefit of the pause for both her and her family.
text: Din bhar ki is bhari bhag-daud ke baad woh ek chota thehraav tumhare andar woh anti-exhaustion space create karega jo ek maa aur bacchon dono ke behtar environment ke liye faydemand hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you meri baat bina judge kiye sunne ke liye. Itne waqt se yahi lag raha tha ki main sirf society ke taane sunne wali ek earning machine ban gayi hoon. Par ab lag raha hai ki main actually un choti cheezon ko manage kar lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the renewed hope for manageable steps and reclaiming her humanity.
text: Yeh mehsus karna ki tum ek machine nahi balki ek feeling insaan ho jo apne time ko control kar sakti hai, yeh ahsaas aage aane wali mushkilon ke darr ko kafi kam kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul. Aaj sach mein dimag se bojh halka feel ho raha hai. Ab kal se at least apni zaroorat ka woh ek chota sa pause toh le hi sakti hoon, bina is baat par guilty feel kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final encouragement separating her worth from guilt and reinforcing her ongoing efforts.
text: Bilkul bina kisi guilt ya society ke pressure ke tum woh shanti deserve karti ho, kyunki ek single maa hone ke bawajood tumne jo himmat dikhayi hai, woh bahut hi strong aur prernadayak baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek machine ban gayi hoon jo bas obligations poori karti hai
text: Office mein aaj phir accent ka mazaak uda. Laga ki shayad main is naye shehar ke kabil hi nahi. Par phir bacchon ka chehra yaad aata hai, jinke liye mujhe 'izzat' se rehna hai. Joint family mein child pressure aur saas ki demands ke beech main ek machine ban gayi hoon jo bas obligations poori karti hai. Main afford nahi kar sakti ki bacchon ko financial kami mehsus ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty and role frame the Seeker is trapped in.
text: Office aur ghar dono jagah itna kuch sambhalna pad raha hai aapko. Ek taraf naye shehar mein kabil banne ka bojh, aur doosri taraf ghar ki sari zimmedariyan... aisa lag raha hoga ki aap apne baare mein sochne ki jagah sirf apne pariwar ke liye apna har farz nibha rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas yahi sach hai. Saas chahti hain ki main perfect bahu banu, aur idhar mere upar office ki deadline ka bojh hota hai. Ghar mein kisi ko nahi dikhta ki main thak rahi hoon. Bas sabko apni zaroorat poori chahiye, aur main bhaag-daud mein lagi rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational dynamics where Seeker's needs are invisible.
text: Perfect bahu banne ki unki ummeed aur office ka kaam, in sabke beech rishton ko nibhaate hue aap khud ko akela mehsus kar rahi hain, kyunki dusron ko aapki lagatar mehnat to dikhti hai, par aapki thakan nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Kisi ko parwah nahi ki main kitni jal rahi hoon andar se. Par main ye dard kisi se keh bhi nahi sakti na. Log kya kahenge ki working aurat kitni complain karti hai, aur aakhir ek maa ko toh sab khushi se sehna hi padta hai...

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue softly without asking a question, holding space.
text: Ghar walon aur logon ke kya kahenge, is darr se aap apni thakan bhi andar hi andar chupane par majboor hain, kyunki bina shikayat kiye maa ki duty poori karni hoti hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh. Ek aurat ko society waise hi judge karti hai. Upar se financial precarity itni zyada hai, EMI ka bojh, bacchon ki aage ki padhai. Mere paas rukne ka option hi nahi hai. Bas din raat bhaagna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Invite the Seeker to explore what it feels like to have no option to stop.
text: Itna financial pressure aur responsibilities ka bojh akele uthana wakai bahut thaka dene wala hoga. Jab andar aisi ghabrahat hoti hai ki main ek pal ke liye bhi ruk nahi sakti, toh us waqt man mein kya darr chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek machine ban gayi hoon jo bas obligations poori karti hai
text: Us waqt bas yahi darr hota hai ki agar main tut gayi, toh mere bacchon ko woh izzat bhari life kaise milegi jo main unhe dena chahti hoon. Main toh jaise ek machine ban gayi hoon jo bas obligations poori karti hai, chahe office wale mere dehati hone ka kitna bhi mazaak udayen.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of failing the children.
text: Aapko sabse bada darr yahi lagta hai ki aapke thakne ya rukne ka asar aapke bacchon ke aane wale kal aur unki life par padega, isliye sab kuch akele aur chupchap bardasht kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Unka chehra dekh kar hi himmat aati hai warna main kabki har chuki hoti. Par ab waqt guzarta ja raha hai aur meri energy bilkul drain ho chuki hai. Din se raat bas ek lambi to-do list bankar reh gayi hai meri zindagi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the endless duration and draining of energy.
text: Din raat, subah se shaam tak sirf zimmedariyon ki ek list ke piche bhaagna, aur aise saalon se bina ruke chalta aana... ye poora routine ab drehere-dheere aapko andar se poori tarah nichod raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha... nichod raha hai mujhe. Ab thodi si ajeeb baat par bhi main rone lagti hoon akele mein. Pehle mujhe office ke un logon ke accent wale taane utne affect nahi karte the, par ab lagta hai jaise mera koi wajood hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the deep exhaustion and isolation hiding behind the duty.
text: Lagta hai ki is bhaari thakan aur lagatar apne pariwar ki expectations ko poora karne ke chakkar mein, aap poori tarah exhausted aur akela mehsus karne lagi hain, jaise aapki apni identity hi kho gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek machine ban gayi hoon jo bas obligations poori karti hai
text: Akelepan ke alawa aur kya hai? Office mein corporate colleagues ko meri zameen se judi problems nahi samajh aati, aur ghar pe saas ko mera office ka stress samajh nahi aata. Ek machine ban gayi hoon jo bas obligations poori karti hai. Koi mujhe samajhne wala nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the Seeker's dual-burden struggle in a metro city and validate her human worth.
text: Aapka yeh akelepan mehsus karna bilkul jayaz hai. Ek working aurat ke liye badhe shehar mein khud ko saabit karna aur ghar ki izzat sambhalna wakai ek kathin agnipariksha jaisa hai. Par aapki keemat sirf in duty ko poora karne se tay nahi hoti; aap ek insaan hain jo behad mushkil halaat mein apna best de rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa kisi ne pehle kabhi nahi bola... ki meri value obligations se alag bhi kuch hai. Varna bachpan se yahi sikhaya gaya ki aurat ki izzat ghar walo ke liye sacrifice karne mein hi hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote showing this is a shared cultural pattern.
text: Hamare samaaj mein working aurton ke sath yeh dual-burden ka pattern bahut common hai—sirf aapka akele ka dukh nahi, lekin koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki humein bachpan se yahi sikhaya jata hai ki ek achhi bahu aur maa ko bas sehna chahiye bina shikayat kiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Usi conditioning ke chakkar mein main saare taane sunti rehti hoon. Sochti hoon ki theek hi toh keh rahi hain saas ji, mera ghar pe hona bahut zaruri hai. Par is chakkar mein main andar se kitni khokhli ho gayi hoon, pata hi nahi chala.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the framework of sacrifice has hollowed her out.
text: Izzat aur sacrifice ke is daanche ne aapko itna buri tarah se baandh diya hai ki sabko khush rakhne ke chakkar mein aapki apni saari energy aur andar ki aawaz hi jaise daba di gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Energy bilkul zero ho gayi hai meri. Main toh guilt mein jeeti hoon agar main Sunday ko half an hour bhi zyada so jaun ya khud ke liye chai ka time nikalun. Har jagah se pressure, ghar par alag aur MNC mein alag.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore how she copes when the pressure becomes unbearable.
text: Ye roz ka guilt aur daily ka double pressure aapko aur bhi zyada drain kar deta hai. Jab yeh sab bojh bahut bhari lagne lagta hai, tab aap is ghabrahat ke beech khud ko kaise wapis sambhalti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bacchon ke future ke baare mein sochne lagti hoon ki agar meri himmat toot gayi toh wo bikhar jayenge. Par main ab is thakan ke sath aage nahi badh pa rahi... koi aisi choti cheez hai jisse yeh bojh thoda kam lage? Main theek hona chahti hoon ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, actionable steps that fit within her busy routine without adding new obligations.
text: Aap bahut himmat wali hain, aur ab aap apne liye kuch badlaav lana chahti hain yeh ek zaroori qadam hai. Kuch aasan cheezein hum dekh sakte hain: kya aap office commute ke dauran sirf 10 minute kuch shaant gaane sun sakti hain bina office emails dekhe? Ya phir shaam ko ghar ghusne se pehle 5 minute kisi paark ki bench par baith kar aaram le sakti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Office commute wali cheez main try kar sakti hoon. Metro mein 20-30 minute lagte hain. Wahan log waise hi mujhe accent ki wajah se ghoorte hain, toh main bas phone mein emails check karti rehti hoon productivity dikhane ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through the first step of taking time for herself during the commute.
text: Pehle yeh karo... jab aap agli baar metro mein baithen, apna phone kuch der ke liye bag mein daal dein. Phir aankhein band karke sirf 5 minute ke liye lambi saansein lein aur aaspas walon ko bilkul bhool jayen. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye, baaki emails office pahuch kar dekh lenge.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek machine ban gayi hoon jo bas obligations poori karti hai
text: Phone bag mein rakhna shuru mein kafi ajeeb lagega mujhe. Main itni aadi ho chuki hoon us pace ki. Ek machine ban gayi hoon jo bas obligations poori karti hai, isiliye do minute ka aaram bhi uncomfortable lagta hai. Par main waqai karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide systemic reframe about productivity and women's rest.
text: Aapka rukna ajeeb isliye lagta hai kyunki corporate culture aur patriarchy dono ne aurton se hamesha 100 percent kaam aur tyaag ki hi umeed rakhi hai. Aapka thodi der pause lena ya thakna koi luxury nahi hai, balki aapka basic haq hai jo aapko koi kamzor insaan nahi banata.

speaker: Seeker
text: 'Haq'.. sach bolun toh maine apne baare mein aise kabhi socha hi nahi. Mujhe lagta tha ki main financially apne bacchon ko secure kar doon, aur saas ke taane sun loon, yahi bas meri kismat hai. Kabhi socha hi nahi ki thoda haq mera mere waqt pe bhi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the shift in perspective regarding her rights feels new and profound.
text: Duties aur obligations nibhaate hue aapne khud ko itna jyada bhool liya tha, ki ab 'mere bhi haq hain' jaisa ek chota sa vichar aapko apne hone ke bare mein ek nayi taraf se sochne ki shuruaat de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, naya lag raha hai. Ab jab main apne bacchon ko dekhti hoon, toh sochti hoon ki unhe ek financially secure maa zaroor chahiye, par ek dukhi aur thaki hui maa nahi. Unke future ke liye mujhe shayad andar se bhi zinda rehna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate this realization as an important victory and link it to her core motivation.
text: Aur yeh ehsaas aana aapke liye ek bahut badi jeet hai. Aap apne bacchon ko poori shiddat se behtar life dena chahti hain, aur unhe ek healthy aur apni keemat pehchanane wali maa dena bhi ussi behtar life ka ek behad zaroori hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein. Waise saas ke taane toh kal se fir shuru honge ki main ghar par proper dhyaan nahi de rahi. Par main koshish karungi ki unki in baaton ka bojh main khud ko personally feel na karaun abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore how she might protect herself mentally from the taunts.
text: Yeh ek bahut achha step hai ki aap unki baaton ko apne aatma-samman se thoda alag rakhna chahti hain. Jab wo aise tana marengi agli baar, toh kya koi aisi choti si baat hai jo aap man hi man khud ko yaad dila sakti hain taaki us bojh se bachi rahein?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main khud ko yahi kahungi ki 'unki nazar mein main chahe jitni kami wali bahu hoon, par asliyat main jaanti hoon ki main poori jaan laga rahi hoon'. Ye soch kar main shayad gusse ko daba sakun bina thake.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how creating emotional distance protects her energy.
text: Matlab aap unki baaton ko unki apni soch ki limit maan kar, unke aur apne beech ek chota sa fasla mehsus karengi, taaki unka wo frustration aapke andar utarkar aapko aur exhaust na kar de.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul fasla chahiye hi, nahi toh main har din unke bolne par rote rote soungi. Apna dhyan rakhna ab zaruri lag raha hai, mujhe nahi chahiye ki meri zindagi bas responsibilities ki ghulami banke reh jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a very simple grounding suggestion to reinforce her worth.
text: Bilkul sahi kaha aapne. Is naye aur mazboot khayal ko apne andar aur pakka karne ke liye, kya aap kal subah uthte hi apna chehra ek baar aaine mein dekh kar, khud ko bina kisi obligation soche ek chhoti si smile de sakti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, smile toh de hi sakti hoon khud ko. Bacchon ke liye main izzat wali life laa rahi hoon, par shayad ab khud ko izzat dena bhi shuru kar rahi hoon. Aaj aapse baat karke andar kaafi halka mehsus ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close out softly with a mirror of her new balance.
text: Dusron ki nazron mein izzat banaye rakhna aur apne khud ke liye izzat dhoondhna, in dono ka naya balance banate hue aage chalne se ab wo darr aur bojh dhire dhire zaroor kam hota mehsus hoga aapko.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai
text: Logon ke mazak aur community exclusion se fark nahi padta mujhe ab, bacchon ki izzat bachani hai bas. Isliye chahe dimaag blank ho jaye, mere hath kaam karte rehte hain kyunki zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai. Main har din wahi routine follow karti hoon taaki unka future safe rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame to validate the Seeker's primary lens of coping.
text: Tumhare bacchon ki izzat aur unka aane wala kal tumhare liye sabse upar hai, isliye tum khud ko bhula kar bas apne farz ko poora karne mein din raat lagi hui ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai
text: Haan, as a single mother log kya kahenge yeh darr hamesha rehta hai. Ek galti aur baatein banne lagti hain. Bahut sharam aati hai jab sab ungli uthate hain, par aakhir zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai, unke liye sunna hi padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the implied fear of consequences for the children.
text: Society ke taane sunna andar se chubhta hoga, aur har waqt yeh ghabrahat rehti hogi ki kahin in baaton ka bura asar bacchon ki zindagi par na pad jaye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai
text: Wahi sabse bada pressure hai. Maine toh aadat daal li hai is community exclusion ki, main akele reh lungi. Par mere bacchon ko yeh jhelna pade toh main mar jaungi. Zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai, aur iske liye main apni sharam daba deti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of carrying this burden silently in response to stigma cue.
text: Itne waqt se tum bina kisi se kuch kahe, akele hi is bojh ko uthate hue bacchon ki dhaal banne ki koshish kar rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaise kahoon aur kisse kahoon? Agar apni thakan dikhaungi toh yahi log kahenge ki dekho single mother hai, isse ghar nahi sambhal raha. Yahi soch soch ke dimaag blank ho jata hai par hath machine ki tarah chalte rehte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore the experience of the emotional overwhelm and numbness.
text: Jab duniya ki nazron se bacchon ko bachane mein dimaag bilkul sunn pad jata hai aur tum sirf kaam karti rehti ho, us sannate mein tumhare andar kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Us waqt andar bas ek hi awaz hoti hai ki tujhe rukna nahi hai. Tujhe perfect maa banna hai taaki samaj in par ungli na uthaye. Meri saari energy bas unko protect karne mein chali jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational element of being a protector against the world.
text: Tumhare bacchon ki fikr ne hi tumhein ek aisi strong deewar bana diya hai jo bina ruki bas sab kuch akele sahe ja rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein main deewar ban gayi hoon. Par andar se main khokhli hoon. Bahut sharam aati hai apni zindagi par, lagta hai chahe kitna bhi khoon pasina baha loon, is samaj ke hisab se main hamesha galat aur incomplete hi rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the underlying exhaustion and helplessness beneath the duty frame.
text: Lagta hai ki tumhare andar ek bohot gehri thakan aur lachari baith gayi hai, kyunki tum chahe apni poori jaan kyu na laga do, logon ki baatein aur taane tumhe thoda akela aur helpless mehsoos karwati hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wahi lachari hai. Main har farz poori lagan se nibhati hoon taaki koi bacchon ko taana na mare, par society kabhi humein poori tarah apnati hi nahi hai. Akele rote hue bhi lagta hai ki bacche na dekh lein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the emotional burden as culturally expected and separate worth from societal judgment.
text: Jo dukh aur thakan tumhe mehsoos hoti hai wo bilkul jayaz hai, kyunki akele ghar aur bacchon ko sambhalna is samaj mein bohot himmat ka kaam hai; aur tumhara rona tumhara fail hona nahi, balki tumhara bacchon ke liye pyaar aur mehnat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap yeh bol rahe hain toh thoda halka lag raha hai. Maine toh maan liya tha ki as a single mother mere hi wajood mein koi kami hai jiske karan community mujhe exclude karti hai. Is bojh aur sharam se nikla kaise jaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the feeling of shame systemically through a brief anecdote.
text: Akele ghar ki zimmedari nibhane wali auraton mein apne hi wajood par shaq hona aur logon ke dar se sharam mehsoos karna bahut common hai—sirf tumhara dukh nahi hai yeh, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj taane marne ke liye taiyar baitha hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh bilkul sach hai ki log jeene nahi dete. Par main thak chuki hoon is sharam ke bojh se. Aage badhne ke liye, thoda theek mehsoos karne ke liye batao main kya karoon ab?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 short, completable options matching the Seeker's strict duty routine.
text: Do choti cheezein hum dekh sakte hain jo tumhari zimmedariyon ke beech fit ho jayen—ya toh din mein jab bacche school hon, tum sirf 5 minute shanti se akele baith kar apni pasand ki chai pee sakti ho, ya phir jab dimaag bahut blank ho, tab kitchen mein hi khade hokar 2 minute lambi saans le sakti ho; kaun sa theek lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Chai akele baith kar peene ka shauk mujhe pehle hua karta tha. Shayad wahi 5 minute nikalna main fir se shuru kar sakti hoon. Usme mujhe kam se kam koi dekhega nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki kal jab bacche school chale jayen, ek cup achhi chai bano… phir ghar ke kisi shant kone mein akele baitho… aur sirf us chai ke swaad ko mehsoos karo… bas itna hi kal ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sirf main aur meri chai... sunne mein kitna ajeeb lag raha hai aaj kal. Main itni busy rehti hoon ki ruki toh akelepan aur overthinking se darr lagta hai. Par main theek hone ke liye try karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the fear of stopping and facing the thoughts.
text: Shanti se akele baithna ab thoda darawna lag raha hai, jaise shayad rukte hi wo log kya kahenge wali aawazein achanak se zor zor se sunayi na dene lag jayein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sahi baat boli aapne. Jaise hi main apne baare mein sochti hoon, mujhe lagta hai log fir ungli uthayenge ki kaise aish se chai pee rahi hai, isko bacchon ki fikr nahi. Isliye kaam mein doobi rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemically reframe the guilt around resting as a societal pressure, not a personal flaw.
text: Jo guilt ki aawazein tumhe rulate hue aur kaam karte rehne par majboor karti hain, wo is samaj ka banaya hua ek unreal dawaab hai jahan ek aurat, khaskar ek maa ko apni har khushi mita dene ko izzat ka naam diya jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Society sach mein maa ko insaan nahi manti, aur single mother ko toh bilkul bhi nahi. Main khud bhi us aawaz ko maan kar apna wajood bhool chuki thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the duty frame absorbed her sense of self.
text: Apne andar ki saari energy tumne unki baaton ko jhutlaane mein aur bacchon ka bhavishya sawarne mein is qadar laga di thi ki tum khud se hi door ho gayi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Door hona hi tha na, lagta tha ki main ruki toh inki nazron se gir jaungi. Par ab ehsaas ho raha hai ki 5 minute rukne se mera farz kamzor nahi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassure that taking time out strengthens her capacity to fulfill her duties.
text: Apne liye waqt nikalna tumhari mamta ya zimmedari ko kisi bhi nazar se chota nahi karta, balki khud ko thoda sakoon dena hi tumhe bacchon ke samne aur bhi himmatwali banata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab ja ke dimaag thoda clear hua hai. Main poori koshish karungi ki kal se main apne din ke 5 minute khud ke haq ke liye zaroor rakhungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt cognitive restructuring for her execution step.
text: Jab tum kal akele shanti se baith kar us chai ka pehla ghoont logi, toh apni us mehanat ko dekh kar khud se kya ek baat kehna chahogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main khud se kahungi ki main jo bhi kar rahi hoon, wo bahut mehnat ka kaam hai aur main kafi achha kar rahi hoon. Mujhe khud par ab sharam nahi, garv hona chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational shift from shame to acceptance.
text: Apne hi kaam par naaz karke tum dhire dhire samaj ke in chubhney wale taano ko peeche chhod rahi ho aur khud ki mehnat ko apnane ke kareeb aa rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, log kya kahenge ab mere liye sabse bada sawal nahi hoga. Main apne dharma ko nibhaungi, par khud ko thaka kar ya gaali de kar nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe of why self-compassion gets lost in caretaking.
text: Kahin na kahin jab bojh aur farz ka darr bohot zyada lada hua ho ek maa par, toh akeleपन mein apne liye pyar bacha hi nahi rehta; aur is baat ko samajh jana ek bahut badi jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Meri aankhon mein ab aansoo aaram ke hain. Mujhe ab akele darr nahi lag raha. Aapne mujhe sun kar mera nazariya thoda badal diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame one more time but in a positive light.
text: Is badlaav ke saath, tumhare farz ka ehsaas aur zyada sakaratmak aur thos ho gaya hai, kyunki ab darr ki jagah vishwas ne le li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Vishwas hi chahiye mujhe. Single mother hona jurm nahi hai. Main kal subah uth ke apni duty bhi karoongi, aur apni chai bhi piyungi bina kisi darr ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence transformed into empowerment.
text: Ab samaj ke in teekhe bolon ka asar aur unke community exclusion ka khauf tumhari subah ki chai ki mithaas ya bacchon ke prati tumhare jazbe ko fika nahi padne dega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul nahi. Meri koshishein aur himmat unke taano se zyada asardaar hain. Mujhe bas kisi ko yeh dukh batana tha, bohot shukriya mujhe aise apna waqt aur sahara dene ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate final readiness and celebrate her inherent resilience.
text: Tumhari mehnat aur tumhara yeh jazba tumhein har mushkil raaste se nikal hi lega, aur yaad rakhna, ek akele insaan ke taur par tumhara wajood unki kisi bhi baat se kahin zyada bada aur sacha hai.
